description: Minute fragment of accounts, possibly dated in the ninth century Hijrī on the recto (סנת לטץ) but there may be a fourth letter after לטץ. The scribe wrote in highly cursive Hebrew script, so this reading of 939 AH is tentative (1532/33 CE). The paleography matches this potential date. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
